name: @lightningai/sdk
description: Lightning AI Sandbox SDK — create and manage sandboxes, run commands, read/write files

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.test: node --test --import tsx tests/config.test.ts tests/sandbox.test.ts tests/filesystem.test.ts tests/pty.test.ts tests/persistence.test.ts tests/scm-version.test.ts tests/scm-package.test.ts
